build_system.build_command: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -C ../cmake/presets/most.cmake -C ../cmake/presets/nolib.cmake -D PKG_GPU=off ../cmake && make -j4
build_system.install_command: No install required; run executable at build/lmp (optional symlink to ~/.local/bin/lmp).

configuration_parameters.description: LAMMPS input script that defines run settings.
configuration_parameters.name: input_script

configuration_parameters.description: LAMMPS data file loaded by the input script.
configuration_parameters.name: data_file

configuration_parameters.description: TIP4P pair style and geometric/cutoff parameters.
configuration_parameters.name: pair_style

configuration_parameters.description: Total integration steps from run command.
configuration_parameters.name: run_steps

configuration_parameters.description: MPI rank count for benchmark consistency.
configuration_parameters.name: mpi_ranks

entry_points.description: LAMMPS CLI entry; initializes MPI, constructs LAMMPS object, and processes input script.
entry_points.name: main

entry_points.description: Reads and executes commands from the selected input script (e.g., -in in.tip4p_nve).
entry_points.name: Input::file

entry_points.description: Implements the run command; initializes and invokes the selected integrator for n steps.
entry_points.name: Run::command

entry_points.description: Per-step integration loop: neighbor decision/rebuild, comm, pair/bond/kspace force calls, integration updates, and thermo/output.
entry_points.name: Verlet::run

entry_points.description: TIP4P long-range pair-force hot path; computes LJ + Coulomb with fictitious M-site mapping and force redistribution.
entry_points.name: PairLJCutTIP4PLong::compute

entry_points.description: Determines whether to rebuild neighbor lists based on every/delay/check and displacement checks.
entry_points.name: Neighbor::decide

entry_points.description: Builds neighbor lists (binning + list construction), updates displacement history used for future rebuild checks.
entry_points.name: Neighbor::build

output_quantities.description: Total energy from thermo output; primary NVE drift signal.
Potential energy from thermo output; sensitive to pair/kspace changes.
Kinetic energy from thermo output; used with etotal for drift consistency.
Per-atom force components (sampled frames) for force-consistency checks.
Pressure consistency check for thermodynamic behavior.
Invariant atom count / no lost atoms during run.
Count of NaN/Inf in reported thermodynamic/force outputs.

suggested_cases.description: Primary short profiling case for TIP4P pair-force + neighbor hot paths.
Same as train-small, independent repetition bucket for weighted-median stability.
Longer-horizon correctness/perf validation for NVE energy behavior and force consistency.

threading_model.description: Primary parallel model is MPI domain decomposition. Pair/neighbor/integration hot paths execute within each rank; ghost exchange and reductions are MPI-based. OpenMP support is optional; comm code defaults to 1 thread if OMP_NUM_THREADS is unset and enforces consistency across ranks.
